CustomField.formula: "{" & "\"ACV__c\":" & TEXT(ACV__c) & "," & IF( ISBLANK(ACV_Change__c), "", "\"ACV_Change__c\":" & TEXT(ACV_Change__c) & "," ) & "\"OP4I_Deal_Id__c\":\"" & OP4I_Deal_Id__c & "\"," & IF( ISBLANK(SBQQ__RenewedSubscription__c), "", "\"Subscriptions__c\":\"" & SBQQ__RenewedSubscription__c & "\"," ) & "\"Customer_Sales_Price_Per_Month__c\":\"" & TEXT(Customer_Sale_Price_Per_Month__c) & "\"," & "\"Term_Start_Date__c\":\"" & TEXT(SBQQ__StartDate__c) & "\"," & "\"Term_End_Date__c\":\"" & TEXT(SBQQ__EndDate__c) & "\"" & "}"
CustomField.label: Ghost Mapping Payload
